channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Wide area pot hole road surface damage., 24th May
item.description:
A further wide area of potholes and road surface damage on this busy road, with vehicles swerving to avoid them. A team recently fixed a poor pothole area further west on the same road, and a matter of yards from this problem. Why didn't the team fix this area too when they had erected temporary traffic lights? It's beyond belief the lack of joined-up thinking and therefore the waste of public funds in not fixing the other damage in the same area at the same time.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 58, High Street, Noverton, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole, difficult to avoid in road, 24th May
item.description:
Outside no.9 Cherry avenue

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Cherry Avenue, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lack of Bus Shelter after a year, 24th May
item.description:
///long.bidder.cuddled Hare and Hounds Bus stop We have not had a bus shelter since October 2024, which means over a year. We would like a bus shelter to be put back in as it protects us from heavy rain and blazing hot sun and gives us protection from winds. Please replace our bus shelter as it has been gone for a year and half. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cheltenham Road East, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 big potholes outside number 27. Big stones coming out of it. A few times the stones have hit the car in the driveway it is outside. There are lot of heavy lorries going to mira showers which makes it worse. Stones on the path and kids kicking them along., 24th May
item.description:
Outside number 27
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 45, Cromwell Road, Lynworth, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 24th May
item.description:
Broken bed and bags of rubbish left on the grass verge next to the flats. Most of it has been there for weeks and is now being added to.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25,27, Harpfield Road, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown grass verges everywhere on abbotswood road, 24th May
item.description:
The grass has been cut in selective areas not all. The grass is getting stupidly long it looks awful. Too long for a household lawn mower otherwise id do it myself
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Abbotswood Road, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree falling down, if goes will end up smashing my gate and fence down and potentially hurting a person or dog if they happen to be in the garden at the time. It’s also limiting access to my gate out to little copse lane as scared will fall on me!, 24th May
item.description:
Off high grove way, Churchdown. Drive down and on left between Phoebes Pad and next house is little walkway with trees. (Virtually opposite post box). Go down here and about halfway on left you will see the tree! It’s been slowly bending but last week or so got dramatically worse. If it damages my fence, gate and anything in my garden as you can appreciate I will not be happy.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Tallis Road, Churchdown, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vegetation is growing and is obscuring view of traffic on pirton lane when emerging from yew tree way, 23rd May
item.description:
Mrs Webb Oakhurst Close
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 58,60,62, Pirton Lane, Churchdown, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked drain opposite 162 Hucclecote Road, Hucclecote, within Tewkesbury Borough Council area, 23rd May
item.description:
It fills with drain water after rain but never empties. Often water goes away but comes back from inside the drain so it must be blocked.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 139, Hucclecote Road, Hucclecote, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Long pothole dent in road mid roundabout, 23rd May
item.description:
It's a long pothole in the middle of the road on a 3 lane roundabout which causes people to veer left or right to avoid it, therefore encroaching on the space of drivers in neighbouring lanes.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmbridge Court Roundabout, Elmbridge, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 x sections of road not repaired, 23rd May
item.description:
Outside 163 Hewlett Contractors were on site this week to repair a number of potholes, they have left two sections not repaired. Why wasn't the job completed properly on the latest visit?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Teme Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
